sources.dashboardDescription: The Kubernetes - CoreDNS provides insights into CoreDNS status including Cache details, Resource Usage.
sources.visualSettingsRaw: {"title":{"fontSize":16},"general":{"type":"area","displayType":"default","outlierBandColor":"#FDECF5","outlierBandMarkerColor":"#ED3CPE","outlierBandFillOpacity":0.15,"outlierBandLineThickness":2,"outlierBandMarkerSize":10,"outlierBandMarkerType":"triangle","markerSize":0,"lineDashType":"solid","markerType":"none","lineThickness":2,"fillOpacity":0.25,"mode":"timeSeries"},"axes":{"axisX":{"title":"","titleFontSize":11,"labelFontSize":10},"axisY":{"titleFontSize":11,"labelFontSize":12,"logarithmic":false,"gridColor":"#dde4e9","title":"CPU Usage"}},"legend":{"enabled":true,"verticalAlign":"bottom","fontSize":12,"maxHeight":50,"showAsTable":false,"wrap":true},"color":{"family":"scheme8"},"overrides":[{"series":["metric=sum(process_cpu_seconds_total)"],"queries":[],"userProvidedChartType":false,"properties":{"type":"area","name":"Total user and system CPU time spent in seconds."}},{"series":["metric=sum(process_open_fds)"],"queries":[],"userProvidedChartType":true,"properties":{"type":"column","name":"Open file descriptors"}}],"hiddenQueryKeys":["C"]}
